chapter_title.ar: باب مَوَارِيثِ الْقَتْلَى وَ مَنْ يَرِثُ مِنَ الدِّيَةِ وَ مَنْ لَا يَرِثُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 34 – Inheritances of the murdered, and who would inherit from the wergild (blood money compensation), and who would not inherit

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/207)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/207)
text: لَا يَرِثُ الْإِخْوَةُ مِنَ الْأُمِّ مِنَ الدِّيَةِ شَيْئاً .

en.hubeali: Humeyd Bin Ziyad, from Ibn Sama’at, from Abdullah Bin Jabala and Ali Bin Rabat, from Abdullah Bin Bukeyr, from Ubeyd Bin Zurara,
Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> has said: ‘The brothers from the mother do not inherit anything from the wergild’.
en.sarwar: 6. Humayd ibn Ziyad has narrated from ibn Sama‘ah from ‘Abd Allah ibn Jabalah and Ali ibn Ribat from ‘Abd Allah ibn Bukayr from ‘Ubayd ibn Zurarah who has narrated the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that brothers from mother’s side do not receive any share from the wergild.’”
